title: Simplify Docker build infrastructure and switch to MCR mirrors
body:
## Summary

Fixes the SkiaSharp-Native CI failure caused by Docker Hub being unreachable from 1ES hosted agents (`dial tcp 192.0.2.4:443: i/o timeout`).

## Changes

- **Switch all base images to MCR mirrors** (`mcr.microsoft.com/mirror/docker/library/`) to fix connectivity
- **Consolidate from 10 Dockerfiles → 4**: `debian/10`, `debian/13`, `musl`, `wasm`
- **Delete 6 unused Dockerfiles**: alpine/amd64, alpine/arm64v8, debian/arm64v8, debian/amd64, debian/clang-cross/11, debian/clang-cross/12
- **Flatten directory structure**: remove `clang-cross/` nesting
- **Rename `alpine` variant → `musl`** throughout (cake, YAML, csproj) — NuGet RIDs already say `linux-musl-*`
- **Move x64 to cross-compile path** via debian/10 (same as other arches)

## Docker structure (before → after)

```
Before (10 Dockerfiles):           After (4 Dockerfiles):
├── alpine/amd64/         ❌       ├── musl/              (debian:12 → musl cross)
├── alpine/arm64v8/       ❌       ├── debian/10/         (LLVM 13, GCC 8)
├── alpine/clang-cross/   → musl/  ├── debian/13/         (LLVM 19, GCC 14)
├── debian/amd64/         ❌       └── wasm/              (dotnet sdk)
├── debian/arm64v8/       ❌
├── debian/clang-cross/10 → debian/10
├── debian/clang-cross/11 ❌
├── debian/clang-cross/12 ❌
├── debian/clang-cross/13 → debian/13
└── wasm/                 (unchanged)
```

## Known issue

`debian:13` is **not yet available on MCR**. Loongarch64 builds will remain broken until the mirror is requested. All other Linux jobs should be unblocked.
